Container.Name: AIOStreams
Container.Overview: AIOStreams is a Stremio addon that combines and configures multiple stream sources, filters, and debrid options in one configurable installation. See the project documentation for Stremio setup and built-in addon notes.
Container.Requires: Before first run: set BASE_URL to the public URL clients use to reach this instance (HTTPS via reverse proxy is typical). Generate SECRET_KEY with: openssl rand -hex 32 (64 hex characters). Optional: set ADDON_PASSWORD to protect the addon; leave blank to disable. For all other environment variables, add them under "Add another Path, Port, Variable, Label or Device" or see the upstream sample: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Viren070/AIOStreams/main/.env.sample

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the container web UI (container listens on 3000 by default).

Config.Name: Data Folder
Config.Description: Persistent data directory (SQLite database and application data). Maps to ./data in the upstream compose example.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public base URL of this instance (required). Used for install links, stream URLs, and built-in addons. Example: https://aiostreams.yourdomain.com — avoid a trailing slash.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: 64-character hex string for encrypting addon configuration. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Database URI
Config.Description: Database connection string. Default SQLite path matches the Data Folder mount.

Config.Name: Addon Name
Config.Description: Display name for this addon instance.

Config.Name: Addon ID
Config.Description: Unique identifier for this addon instance; change if you run a distinct public instance.

Config.Name: Addon Password
Config.Description: Optional API/install password. Leave empty to disable. Multiple values allowed, comma-separated.

Config.Name: Internal URL
Config.Description: Optional override for how the server reaches itself (e.g. behind reverse proxy). Defaults to local container access.

Config.Name: Redis URI
Config.Description: Optional Redis URL for caching in scaled deployments. Leave blank for single-container setups.
